IDirectSoundStream

This interface is used to manage sound streams.

The methods of the IDirectSoundStream interface can be organized into the following groups:

3D Listener Methods SetDistanceFactor
  SetDopplerFactor
  SetRolloffCurve
  SetRolloffFactor
Batch parameter manipulation SetAllParameters
Buffer management Discontinuity
  FlushEx
  Flush
  GetInfo
  GetStatus
  Process
Distance SetMaxDistance
  SetMinDistance
Operation mode SetMode
Position SetPosition
Play management Pause
  PauseEx
Sound management GetVoiceProperties
  SetEG
  SetFilter
  SetFormat
  SetFrequency
  SetHeadroom
  SetI3DL2Source
  SetLFO
  SetMixBins
  SetMixBinVolumes
  SetOutputBuffer
  SetPitch
  SetVolume
Sound projection cones SetConeAngles
  SetConeOrientation
  SetConeOutsideVolume
Velocity SetVelocity

The IDirectSoundStream interface also supports the AddRef and Release methods. The QueryInterface method is not supported on the Xbox.

The LPDIRECTSOUNDSTREAM type is defined as a pointer to the IDirectSoundStream interface:

typedef struct IDirectSoundStream  *LPDIRECTSOUNDSTREAM;

Requirements

  Header: Declared in Dsound.h.

See Also

Obtaining the 3D Buffer Object, Retrieving Objects from an Audiopath
